Nomura Holdings ( (JP:8604) ) has provided an update.

Nomura Holdings plans to grant restricted stock units and performance share units in late May 2026 to directors, executive officers and employees across the group as part of a deferred compensation framework. Shares linked to these awards, estimated at up to 30 million and valued around 40 billion yen, will be delivered mainly via disposal of treasury stock over multi-year vesting periods tied to time and performance, signaling a continued emphasis on equity-based incentives and long-term alignment with stakeholders.

The firm serves individuals, institutions, corporates and governments through four main divisions: Wealth Management, Investment Management, Wholesale, and Banking, offering advisory, trading and asset management solutions worldwide.

data.title: Daito Pharma to Lead JV Taking Over Kyorin’s Generic Drug Business
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Daito Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4577) ) has provided an announcement.

Daito Pharmaceutical has signed a memorandum of understanding with Kyorin Pharmaceutical to transfer Kyorin’s generic drug operations, including subsidiary Kyorin Rimedio and two production plants, to a new joint venture, Pharmatech Co-creation Platform, Inc. Daito will form this JV with two partners, becoming the largest but non-controlling shareholder, and will contribute its API R&D, supply strength and quality systems to bolster the platform.

The move aligns with Daito’s DTP2027 medium-term plan, which emphasizes streamlining existing businesses, consolidating manufacturing and enhancing lifecycle management of products. By integrating upstream functions such as R&D, manufacturing and quality assurance, Daito aims to help resolve Japan’s chronic generic drug supply instability, reinforce its own CMO business base and potentially upgrade industry-wide resilience and competitiveness in generic pharmaceuticals.

Kyorin Rimedio, the core target company in the deal, generated annual sales above ¥30 billion but has seen pressure on profitability, highlighting structural challenges in the generic sector. Incorporating these assets into the new JV is expected to rationalize overlapping capacity across firms, support government policy on integrating manufacturing and marketing approvals, and strengthen the broader pharmaceutical supply chain for stakeholders across the market.

More about Daito Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

Daito Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based drug manufacturer specializing in active pharmaceutical ingredients and finished pharmaceutical products, with a growing focus on generic medicines. The company positions itself as an R&D-driven contract manufacturing organization, leveraging its long-standing FDA-certified quality standards and domestic API capabilities to support stable pharmaceutical supply in Japan.

Average Trading Volume: 90,139

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen39.15B

data.title: Nippon Sharyo Lifts Year-End Dividend on Strong Earnings and Signals Higher Payouts Ahead
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Nippon Sharyo ( (JP:7102) ) is now available.

Nippon Sharyo’s board has approved a year-end dividend of 25 yen per share for shareholders of record on March 31, 2026, up from both the prior forecast and the previous year’s 20 yen, bringing the total payout to 360 million yen from retained earnings. The move, subject to shareholder approval in June, reflects stronger-than-expected financial results and underscores the firm’s commitment to stable, gradually increasing dividends, with management also signaling a higher total annual dividend of 50 yen per share for the fiscal year ending March 2027.

This dividend increase suggests improving profitability and cash generation, reinforcing Nippon Sharyo’s capacity to reward shareholders while maintaining resources for expansion. The guidance for an even higher dividend level next fiscal year could bolster investor confidence and support the company’s market valuation, positioning it more competitively among peers that emphasize consistent shareholder returns.

More about Nippon Sharyo

Nippon Sharyo, Ltd. is a Japanese manufacturer listed on the TSE Prime and NSE Premier markets, historically known for rolling stock and industrial machinery. The company operates with a shareholder-return policy centered on long-term, stable dividends, balancing payouts with internal reserves to support future business expansion and financial soundness.

Average Trading Volume: 40,899

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen52.17B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Range International Limited ( (AU:RAN) ) has issued an update.

Range International Limited has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for 11:30am AEST on 25 May 2026 at the offices of Automic Group in Sydney, with the meeting to be held in person. The company has made the notice of meeting and explanatory statement available online, with hard copies only for shareholders who have opted in, and it has detailed several proxy voting options including online, post, hand delivery and email to facilitate shareholder participation.

The AGM arrangements underscore Range International’s effort to balance regulatory compliance with digital accessibility for its shareholder base, particularly by leveraging electronic distribution under the Corporations Act. By outlining multiple channels for proxy lodgment and providing clear contact points for queries, the company is aiming to encourage engagement from both domestic and overseas investors ahead of the meeting.

More about Range International Limited

Range International Limited is a manufacturer of plastic pallets that uses its proprietary ThermoFusion technology to produce zero-waste, 100% upcycled plastic pallets. The company operates production lines at its East Java factory in Indonesia and sells its Re>Pal-branded pallets into Indonesia and across the broader Asia-Pacific region.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Q-linea’s 2025 Report Highlights Rapid Infection Diagnostics and ASTar Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Q-linea AB ( (SE:QLINEA) ).

Q-linea’s 2025 annual report outlines its mission to help preserve the efficacy of antibiotics by providing rapid diagnostic tools that support optimal treatment of infectious diseases. The company emphasizes its strategy of leveraging strong in-house competence and infrastructure to deliver integrated diagnostic systems, with a commercial focus on consumables and global healthcare partnerships.

The report highlights sepsis and rapid antimicrobial susceptibility testing (AST) as key clinical areas, centering on the ASTar platform and its role in shortening time to optimal therapy. It also points to customer feedback, clinical evaluations such as the LIFETIMES study, and sustainability and governance sections, signaling continued efforts to validate its technology, deepen market adoption, and strengthen its long-term position in the diagnostics sector.

More about Q-linea AB

Q-linea AB is a diagnostics company focused on infectious disease testing, developing integrated systems that help healthcare providers rapidly and accurately diagnose and treat infections. Its main products and solutions support antibiotic stewardship by enabling optimized, patient-specific treatment decisions, with a business model that expects most revenue from consumable sales and a mix of direct and partner-driven distribution.

data.title: IwaiCosmo Holdings Lifts Profit 55% and Hikes Dividend on Strong FY 2026 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:8707) ) just unveiled an announcement.

IwaiCosmo Holdings reported strong consolidated results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, with operating revenues up 25.3% to ¥32.26 billion and profit attributable to owners of the parent surging 55.3% to ¥10.44 billion. Return on equity improved to 14.7%, while total assets rose to ¥213.03 billion and net assets to ¥74.30 billion, although the equity ratio edged down to 34.9%.

Robust earnings supported a significant increase in shareholder returns, as annual dividends were raised from ¥145.00 to ¥225.00 per share, keeping the payout ratio at 50.6% and lifting the dividend-to-net-assets ratio to 7.4%. Despite the strong performance, the group reiterated it will not provide full-year earnings guidance due to sensitivity to market conditions, opting instead to disclose quarterly results and dividend forecasts when reasonable estimates become available.

More about IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc.

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. is a Japan-based financial services group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company operates mainly in the securities and investment services industry, generating operating revenues through brokerage, trading and related financial operations for individual and institutional investors under Japanese GAAP.

Average Trading Volume: 132,193

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen88.2B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sun Silver Ltd. ( (AU:SS1) ) has issued an update.

Sun Silver Limited has called its Annual General Meeting for 10:00 a.m. AWST on 25 May 2026 at Level 39 Central Park in Perth, Western Australia. The company is urging shareholders to participate in the meeting either in person or via proxy voting, with all resolutions to be decided by poll based on proxy instructions and votes cast on the day.

In line with Australian corporate law and a move away from paper-based communication, Sun Silver will not mail physical copies of the notice of meeting except to investors who have specifically requested hard copies. The notice is available on the company’s website and the ASX announcements platform, and investors are encouraged to update their details and lodge proxy votes electronically through the Automic share registry ahead of the 23 May 2026 deadline.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SS1) stock is a Buy with a A$4.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sun Silver Ltd. stock, see the AU:SS1 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sun Silver Ltd.

Sun Silver Limited is an Australian-listed company headquartered in Perth and traded on the ASX under the ticker SS1. The company has a broad shareholder base that it engages through formal governance processes, including annual general meetings and electronic communications via its share registry and online investor portal.

data.title: Alkemy’s Tees Valley Lithium Refinery Secures Cost Validation and Key Supply Chain Deals
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Alkemy Capital Investments Plc ( (GB:ALK) ).

Alkemy Capital’s Tees Valley Lithium project in Teesside has cleared a key milestone with an independent review by Logic‑i validating the capital cost estimate for its first lithium hydroxide train as robust and in line with global benchmarks. The finding reinforces earlier analysis that the refinery ranks among the world’s most cost‑effective lithium projects, strengthening its investment case and positioning within Europe’s emerging battery materials ecosystem.

The company also signed a memorandum of understanding with Buxton Lime to secure a framework for long‑term supply of quicklime, a critical reagent in lithium refining, and to optimise handling systems and domestic supply chains. Alongside this, TVL has advanced talks with neighbouring industrial operators on shared infrastructure and utilities at its Billingham site, while environmental and ecology studies returned no adverse findings, supporting timely mobilisation and de‑risking for stakeholders.

Spark’s Take on ALK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ALK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, ongoing losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity with higher debt). Technicals are a meaningful offset, showing a strong uptrend and positive momentum, but valuation remains challenged due to loss-making status and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ALK stock, click here.

More about Alkemy Capital Investments Plc

Alkemy Capital Investments Plc is focused on developing critical mineral infrastructure to support the global energy transition, primarily through its wholly owned subsidiary Tees Valley Lithium. TVL is developing Europe’s first independent battery-grade lithium hydroxide refinery in Teesside, targeting the fast-growing electric vehicle and battery materials supply chain in the UK and Europe.

Average Trading Volume: 58,517

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £33.7M
